identity.name: ClearDeal
identity.tagline: The Trust Layer for Indian OOH
identity.description: A high-trust, official-grade platform for billboard trading. Aesthetic combines the authority of government documents with the speed of modern fintech. Clean, dense, and audit-focused.

usage.caption: font-dm text-sm text-slate-500
usage.code: font-mono text-xs bg-slate-100 px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-slate-700

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-sm rounded-md h-10 px-6 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 shadow-sm rounded-md h-10 px-6 font-medium
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-md h-10 px-4
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 rounded-md h-10 px-6

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.base: h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Public Sans' for all Headings (h1-h3) to give an official government feel.
Use 'DM Sans' for body text for high legibility.
Implement the 'Negotiation Chat' as a vertical timeline with distinct 'Offer' and 'Counter' blocks.
Ensure the 'Audit Trail' is always visible or accessible via a side drawer in the negotiation view.
Use the 'verified_badge' style for any entity (Company, Billboard) that has passed verification.
For the Map View, use Leaflet with the provided CartoDB Light tile layer for a clean, professional look.
The 'Owner Dashboard' should be dense with data (Occupancy Rate, Revenue) using the grid system.
The 'Rep Dashboard' should be mobile-optimized, focusing on a feed of 'Active Deals' and 'Pending Actions'.
Use the provided placeholder images for billboards if no real ones are available.
CRITICAL: Do NOT use default shadcn radii. Override with 'rounded-md' or 'rounded-lg' for a sharper, more professional look.
CRITICAL: Ensure all inputs have clear labels and 'focus:ring-2' states for accessibility.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
